title: verbascum atlanticum
intro: Verbascum atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic mullein, is a biennial plant species in the figwort family that is native to the western coast of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum atlanticum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and alleviate congestion, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
